title: Race Breakaway Simulation
description: Sustain above-threshold after a hard effort
purpose: Sustain above-threshold after a hard effort

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 140% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 2:00 at 140%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/6. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 2:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 2:00 at 140%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 16% complete. Block 1/2. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 105% at 88-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/2. 105% for 5:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/2.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/2. 105% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 17 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/2. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 15:00 at 95%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/2. 15:00 at 95%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/2. 42 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 10:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 10:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/6. 2:00 at 140%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 140% × 2:00. Then 30min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 140%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 56% done. 2 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 140% × 2:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 25 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 44 minutes in. 105% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 95% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 15:00 at 95%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 15:00 at 95%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 95% × 15:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 44min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 64 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 64 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
